scripts.e2e: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @meridian/cli copy-renderer && pnpm --filter @meridian/cli e2e
scripts.sample:graph: pnpm --filter @meridian/cli build && SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH=1783880383.984 node packages/cli/dist/bin.js generate examples/orders-service --test-coverage examples/orders-service/coverage/coverage-final.json -o packages/renderer/public/sample-graph.json
